meta.description: A branching decision point in a human procedure.

ifYes.description: What to do if condition is true.

ifNo.description: What to do if condition is false.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_f1ab23fb_b82d_4559_915e_2aab964d3568" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "condition" TEXT,
    "if_yes" TEXT,
    "if_no" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_f1ab23fb_b82d_4559_915e_2aab964d3568" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_f1ab23fbb82d4559_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
